instruction: Move the title of page 2 to the bottom of the slide.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/134_2.pptx', 'dest': '134_2.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/15aece23-a215-4579-91b4-69eec72e18da/134_2_Original.pptx', 'dest': '134_2_Original.pptx'}), examine_shape=False, examine_title_bottom_position=True)
